baseline_method: Median for TMAX, TMIN, RH per DOY across 2020-2024. Rainfall uses stochastic method: pWet = proportion of wet days, wetAmount = median of non-zero rainfall values.
baseline_note: 5-year short-term baseline (2020-2024). NOT a WMO 30-year climate normal. Period heavily influenced by La Nina (2020-2022) and El Nino (2023-2024). Use with caution for long-term climate representation.
missing_value_treatment: -999 replaced with NaN (excluded from median). -1 rainfall (trace values) replaced with 0mm.
